# Implementation External Reviews

This section indexes external lineage reviews and compatibility notes for upstream or adjacent systems that inform arbPlusJAX implementation work.

This index is generated from `docs/implementation/external/` and should be refreshed through `python tools/check_generated_reports.py` before commit/push.

Current documents:
- [barnesg_implementation.md](/docs/implementation/external/barnesg_implementation.md)

- [ducc_review_implementation.md](/docs/implementation/external/ducc_review_implementation.md)
